creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On 01-Jan-00 Chris Piazza wrote:
> Hi Will,
> 
> pkg/COMMENT and pkg/DESCR are blank in this port, could you please
> send the contents of these two files?

I don't know what the HECK I was smokin' when I sent that port in without those
files! :-)

Here they are:

------[begin snip]-------

pkg/COMMENT:
Another rubik's cube game with a rather interesting interface.

pkg/DESCR:
Rubix is another X11-based incarnation of the world-famous
"Rubik's Cube" game. It has the capability of saving games,
which, according to the author, can't be found in any other
Rubik's Cube games.

WWW: http://sed.free.fr/rubix/
Author: sed <sed_sed@my-dejanews.com>

--Will <andrews@technologist.com>

-------[end snip]-------

Thanks, Chris.

--
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
